title: Day of the Dead: A Celebration of Life
original_title: Day of the Dead: A Celebration of Life
overview: Each year, the spirits of the dead return to visit the living in this fascinating look into the famous Mexican tradition, Day of the Dead also known as Dia de Los Muertos.
